title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Mahindra Navistar

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Mahindra Navistar
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Navistar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahindra Navistar:
Mahindra Navistar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Navistar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
